title: JAGUAR Protocol
author: cramanuj
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: NOTE: This is an older version of JAGUAR R package. JAGUAR: Joint Analysis of Genotype and Group-Specific Variability Using a Novel Score Test Approach to Map Expression Quantitative Trait Loci (eQTL) This is an R-package to implement a novel score test method to map group-specific expression quantitative trait loci (eQTL) that tests for the additive genotypic effect and variability among tissues in a mixed effects model framework. This approach implicitly assumes that the effect of a SNP on gene expression could be in different directions in different tissues. The newest version appliesa closed-form expression of our model and speeds up the computations using templated C++ linear algebra library, Armadillo.
